_comment: TEMPLATE FILE — not loaded by the seed loader. The seed loader globs *.json in this directory but the seed_loader filters out filenames starting with an underscore so this file is ignored at runtime. Use it as a reference for the expected shape of a real curve file.

_schema.name: <string> — human-readable name shown in the UI dropdown
_schema.line: <string> — bullet line / model (e.g. Hybrid Target, ELD-Match)
_schema.datapoints: <array of {mach, cd}> — sorted ascending by mach

_example.name: Berger 6.5mm 140gr Hybrid Target
_example.source: Berger Bullets Custom Drag Model file (date)
_example.notes: Doppler-radar Cd table for Berger 6.5mm 140gr Hybrid Target
